name: happy-path-new-convex-table-scaffolder
query: Create a skill for scaffolding new Convex tables in packages/convex. It should add the schema entry, generate a starter CRUD file, and update the _generated exports.
expected_behavior: Asks clarifying questions only if purpose/triggers/workflow are ambiguous — the query already contains all three, so should proceed
Picks a gerund-form name like 'scaffolding-convex-tables' (not 'convex-table-helper' or 'convex-utils')
Greps .claude/skills/ for overlap with existing Convex-related skills before writing
Creates .claude/skills/scaffolding-convex-tables/SKILL.md using the template at skill-template/SKILL.md
Writes third-person description ≤1024 chars that names concrete trigger phrases ('new convex table', 'add a table', 'scaffold convex')
Extracts any bundled template (e.g. starter CRUD file) into a subdirectory, does not inline content over ~20 lines
Re-reads the file with the Read tool after writing to verify frontmatter, name match, and one-level references
Final report is a single sentence with path + what the skill does, not a dump of the file
failure_modes: Writes the skill without clarifying or overlap check
Inlines a long starter template directly in SKILL.md
Final report summarizes every section instead of a one-liner
